# `.claude` Directory Development Guide

## References

When editing files under `.claude/`, refer to these official docs:

- **Best practices:** https://www.anthropic.com/engineering/claude-code-best-practices
- **Rules (`.claude/rules/`):** https://code.claude.com/docs/en/memory#modular-rules-with-claude%2Frules%2F
- **Skills (`.claude/skills/`):** https://code.claude.com/docs/en/skills
